basic_details.job_title: IIT Delhi Project Research Scientist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi) Project Research Scientist Notification 2026 has been released on 15 May 2026 on the official website home.iitd.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Delhi Project Research Scientist Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: PhD, First or Second class in Master's degree/integrated Master's degrees in Life Sciences (Biotechnology/ Biochemistry/ Microbiology/Biophysics/ Molecular Biology) from a recognized university. Desirable: PhD degree with research experience and publication in cancer biology including in vitro expertise in cancer biology, cell culture (organoid or tumoroïd culture), molecular biology and big-data analysis.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 28-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Delhi Project Research Scientist (Non-medical) position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 28th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a PhD in Life Sciences (Biotechnology/Biochemistry/Microbiology/Biophysics/Molecular Biology). A Master's degree in the same fields with first or second class is also acceptable.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Project Research Scientist role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 56,000/- plus HRA at 30%.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for this government job?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to prepare your bio-data, attach necessary documents, and send it to the official email address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Project Research Scientist position?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an interview, which will be conducted via video conferencing.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Project Research Scientist (Non-medical) at IIT Delhi.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job position at IIT Delhi.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT Delhi located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi is located in New Delhi, Delhi, with the pincode 110016.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' description.
